_headline: Phase 5 baselines on the 51-contract held-out test set. The reportable, defensible metric is json_validity_rate: naive 0/51 (0%), strong-prompt 6/51 (12%). The unmodified Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct rarely emits output that both parses as JSON and validates against the 12-field schema — this is the 'before' floor that fine-tuning (Phase 6) aims to beat.
_per_field_caveat: The 'per_field_match_rate_CAVEATED' blocks are NOT a headline metric. Schema-invalid predictions are scored as empty extractions; because many CUAD fields are null in the gold, an empty prediction is counted 'correct' on those sparse fields (both-null match), which inflates the per-field and overall numbers — see docs/DATASET.md on the trivial null-emitting baseline. These per-field scores are only meaningful in the Phase 7 three-way comparison across models that mostly emit valid JSON. Aggregate numbers only — no CUAD-derived contract text is included.
